content:
Building a production-ready, scalable SaaS admin dashboard from scratch often takes weeks of configuring state management, designing layout engines, and crafting UI components.

To solve this, I built SaaSlu — a modern, high-performance SaaS Admin Dashboard Template powered by React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

Here is a breakdown of its core tech stack and architecture! ⚡

🛠️ Core Tech Stack & Features

•
React 19 & Vite: Ultra-fast HMR, clean state architecture, and optimized build performance.

•
Tailwind CSS & shadcn/ui: Accessible Radix UI primitives coupled with utility-first styling.

•
Dynamic Style Engine: Seamless switching between Light/Dark modes, Vertical/Horizontal layouts, and customizable color palettes.

•
100% Native RTL Engine: Built-in bi-directional layout support (LTR & RTL) for global accessibility.

📊 5 Specialized Dashboard Layouts

•
Overview Dashboard: High-level metrics for standard SaaS health tracking.

•
Analytics Dashboard: Advanced charting & data-driven insights.

•
CRM & Sales Dashboard: Lead tracking, pipelines, and customer metrics.

•
Finance Dashboard: Revenue tracking, invoice pipelines, and profit optimization.

•
Team & Project Dashboard: Kanban workflows, task distribution, and progress monitoring.

📦 15+ Pre-Built Internal Applications

SaaSlu includes complete UI flows for:

• User Management & Roles

• Interactive Calendar & Task Manager

• CRM Directories & Deals Tracker

• File Manager, Chat, and Email UIs

💬 Community Feedback

I'd love to get feedback from the Dev.to community!

• What's your go-to layout structure for complex dashboard analytics?

• How do you prefer handling dark mode color tokens in Tailwind?
